title: Colorful Plant-Based Quinoa Bowl with Roasted Vegetables and Avocado
description: Top-down view of a vibrant plant-based quinoa bowl featuring roasted sweet potatoes, broccoli, cherry tomatoes, red onion, fresh avocado slices, leafy greens, and a dollop of hummus, drizzled with a light dressing. The bowl is placed on a rustic wooden table with a linen napkin, spoon, and a jar of dressing nearby, illuminated by natural bright light.
